About Me

Hi, I am Adeyemi Esther, your e-commerce growth partner.

I am a freelance e-commerce consultant and store designer specialising in Shopify, WordPress, WooCommerce, and Wix. I help fashion, beauty, dropshipping, and luxury brands stop guessing and start growing with stores that look premium and perform like a machine.

Whether you are launching from scratch, scaling past a plateau, or struggling with traffic that will not convert, I find exactly what is broken, fix it, and hand you a store you are proud of.

I have helped brands across Nigeria, the UK, and beyond from handmade sellers to high-end boutiques build and grow their digital presence with clarity, strategy, and real results.

Shopify Design WordPress WooCommerce Wix Stores Store Audits Marketing Strategy Product Research Dropshipping Setup Conversion Optimisation Fashion and Beauty Luxury Brands

What I Offer

10 Services built for e-commerce growth

From store builds to product research, every service is designed to move your business forward.

🛒

Shopify Store Design

Custom Shopify stores for fashion, beauty, and luxury brands. Beautiful, mobile-first, and built to convert browsers into buyers from day one.

Most Popular
🌐

WordPress Website Design

Professional WordPress websites built for speed, SEO, and conversions. Clean layouts, powerful plugins, and a site that grows with your brand.

Full Build
🛍

WooCommerce Store Setup

Complete WooCommerce store builds on WordPress with full product setup, payment integration, and a design that reflects your brand identity.

E-Commerce
✨

Wix Store Design

Stunning Wix e-commerce stores with professional layouts, product pages, and conversion-focused design, ready to launch fast.

Launch Ready
🔍

Store Audit

A deep-dive review of your store covering UX, speed, product pages, checkout flow, and messaging with a clear prioritised report of what is costing you sales.

Diagnostic
📦

Product Research

Data-driven product research for dropshipping and e-commerce brands. Winning products, supplier vetting, and niche validation to remove all guesswork.

Research
📈

Marketing Strategy

A 6-pillar marketing plan covering traffic, email, social, paid ads, retention, and conversion with a 90-day implementation roadmap tailored to your store.

Strategy
🚀

Dropshipping Setup

Complete dropshipping store setup from niche selection and winning products to supplier integration, branded design, and a fully launch-ready configuration.

Setup
✏️

Product Page Optimisation

Rewrite and redesign your product pages to sell. Compelling copy, trust signals, urgency triggers, and a friction-free checkout experience that converts.

Conversion
💎

Store Launch Package

Everything you need to go live with confidence. Full store build, product pages, homepage, policies, email setup, and a thorough pre-launch review.

All-in-One

How It Works

From inquiry to results in 4 steps

1

Discovery Call

We talk through your store, your goals, and what is not working. No pitch, just honest conversation.

2

Audit and Strategy

I analyse your store in full and deliver a clear report with findings and a prioritised fix list.

3

Design and Build

Implementation begins. Whether it is design, copy, or strategy, I deliver fast and keep you in the loop.

4

Launch and Review

We review together, make final tweaks, and launch. You get everything you need to maintain momentum.
